title: Simultaneous Determination of Antimnoy and Tin by  N-Benzoyl-N-Phenylhydroxylamine
author: M. K. SHIRGUPPI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Inorganic and Nuclear Chemistry Laboratory, Institute of Science, Bombay-400 032 

  Manuscript received 16 January 1978; accepted 15 June 1976  

 A method has been developed for simultaneous determination of Sb and Sn in Type Metal and White Metal using N-benzoyl-N-phenylhydroxylamine as a precipitating agent. The accuracy for each element is better than 0.6%. Sb(III) can be estimated in the presence of Sb(V).
